same_day_validation.truth_boundary: Capsule Field-2 separates raw wins from anti-fixed-open strict wins. It does not prove stable field or physical energy.

truth_boundary: Capsule Field-2 Day-0 locks a capsule family and separates raw wins from fixed_open imitation. Same-day validation is not cross-day proof and does not prove stable ordered field, physical energy generation, CPU-free execution, endpoint-free execution, network supercompute, or a finished ghost computer.
